_comment: Universal entity example — replace with your roster.
_usage: Genre scaffolds rename this to characters.json / enemies.json / npcs.json and populate with per-genre content.
_anim_flag_doc: anim_flag is the canonical cache field. 'static' = baked once at init. 'animating' = single buffer re-baked from SDF on every 12fps animation tick. 'translate'/'rotate' are informational tags equivalent to 'static' for cache purposes (motion is composite-time; rotation snaps on tick).
name: Example Player
